strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, including AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq)
Strong backend expertise with multiple languages (Node.js, Java, Kotlin, D, C++) and databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL)
Proven track record in performance optimization, scalability, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Primary stack alignment is strong but AI agent experience is not clearly tied to enterprise tooling needs
Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest (though familiar with testing frameworks)
Short tenure (10 months) at current role (re:cinq) raises questions about long-term commitment
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional breadth of technical skills with deep expertise in the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and strong backend capabilities across multiple languages. His experience with AI agents and cloud-native development is valuable, though not perfectly aligned with the enterprise automation focus. The recent job hopping (10 months at current role) is the only notable concern, but his overall profile strongly matches the senior full-stack role requirements.
